tracks.title: Financial Statements & Accounting Mechanics
tracks.description: Analyze Income Statements, Balance Sheets, and Cash Flow Statements.

milestones.title: Financial Report Analysis
milestones.description: Evaluate company profitability, liquidity, and financial health.

resources.title: Financial Accounting & Statement Reading
resources.notes: Deconstruct 10-K filings, net income, operating cash flow, and debt ratios.

tracks.title: Fundamental Valuation & Asset Classes
tracks.description: Perform Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) valuation and evaluate stocks, bonds, and ETFs.

milestones.title: Intrinsic Valuation & Modeling
milestones.description: Estimate intrinsic company value and compare price-to-earnings multiples.

resources.title: Valuation: Measuring and Managing Value
resources.notes: Calculate WACC, terminal growth rates, and projected free cash flows.

tracks.title: Portfolio Construction & Risk Management
tracks.description: Build asset allocation strategies, manage risk, and optimize personal wealth.

milestones.title: Portfolio Optimization & Risk Controls
milestones.description: Diversify investments across asset classes and rebalance allocations.

resources.title: The Intelligent Investor & Modern Portfolio Theory
resources.notes: Understand Sharpe ratio, market beta, rebalancing frequency, and index funds.
